things.name: Tunis Medina
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Arab medina with the Great Mosque of Zitouna and the souqs

things.name: Carthage Archaeological Site
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage ruins of the Phoenician and Roman city that rivalled Rome

things.name: Bardo National Museum
things.description: World's finest collection of Roman mosaics in an Aghlabid-era palace

things.name: Sidi Bou Said
things.description: Blue and white clifftop village above the Gulf of Tunis - Tunisia's most beautiful town

things.name: Souq of the Chechias (Hat Makers)
things.description: Traditional craftsmen making the distinctive red felt chechias in the old medina

things.name: Dar Ben Abdallah Museum
things.description: 18th-century Ottoman palace with the finest collection of Tunisian domestic arts

things.name: Avenue Habib Bourguiba
things.description: Tunis's Champs-Elysees with the Municipal Theatre and outdoor cafes

things.name: Dougga Roman Ruins
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage best-preserved Roman town in Africa, 110km from Tunis

things.name: Belvedere Park & Modern Art Museum
things.description: City park with a beautiful zoo and Tunisia's leading contemporary art collection

things.name: Lablabi Chickpea Soup
things.description: Tunis's famous breakfast of chickpeas in broth with stale bread, harissa and olive oil
